chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 127 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Main Case 13.12.2023: None present for the Applicant None present for the private respondents Mr. Talib Ali Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh ASI Akhlaq Ahmed Khan P.S. Joharabad.-.-.-.-.-. Today no one is in attendance either for the Applicant or the private respondents. The applicant through the listed application seeks setting aside the impugned order dated 13.02.2023 as well as directions against the official respondents to lodge the FIR against the private respondents. The application stands disposed of in the following terms:- Applicant can provide information of any offence, which he believes to be correct, to the police station having the requisite jurisdiction in the matter. The Applicant will be heard in a professional and polite manner by the SHO. It will be the primary duty of the police to determine whether the information provided discloses the commission of an offence or not, if the information provided is correct and true, and if it is, whether it discloses the commission of a cognizable or non-cognizable offence. The police may then proceed further in accordance with law. It is clarified that this order should not be interpreted as mandatory directions for lodging an F.I.R. All that the police are directed to ensure is compliance with the law. JUDGE
